title: Publication-Quality Figure Generation (8 Figures) for CSD-LLM Paper
summary: Demo notebook for the CSD-LLM paper's publication-quality figure evaluation artifact. Generates 2 self-contained NeurIPS-styled figures (Fig 1: Conceptual Overview with ecological/LLM CSD analogs, Fig 8: Prospective Protocol Schematic flowchart) using 300 DPI, serif fonts, and colorblind-safe palette. Loads pre-computed evaluation metrics for all 8 paper figures from mini_demo_data.json, displays a compliance summary table (sizes, dimensions, data points), and visualizes file sizes, data points per figure, and NeurIPS dimension compliance in a 3-panel chart. Uses full original parameters (DPI=300, 500 curve points, 200 distribution points). Runs in under 5 minutes.
